message:
test(string_abi): expand string test coverage from 20 to 82 tests (+678 lines)

Cover memcpy/memmove/memset/memcmp/memchr/memrchr, strlen/strcmp/strcpy/strncpy,
strcat/strncat, strdup/strndup, strtok_r/strsep, memmem/mempcpy/memccpy,
bzero/bcmp, strerror/strerror_r, strlcpy/strlcat, strverscmp, swab, strsignal,
strcoll/strxfrm, index/rindex, rawmemchr, fnmatch patterns and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
